me.about: I'm a [Data Scientist](https://www.mayo.edu/) working at the Division of Hematology and Oncology, Department of Medicine, [Mayo Clinic](https://www.mayo.edu/) in Scottsdale, AZ. I was a Research Scientist at the [Department of Biomedical Informatics and Data Science](https://medicine.yale.edu/biomedical-informatics-data-science/) of [Yale University School of Medicine](https://medicine.yale.edu/), working with [Dr. Hua Xu](https://medicine.yale.edu/profile/hua-xu/). I was also a research fellow in the [Department of AI and Informatics](https://www.mayo.edu/research/departments-divisions/artificial-intelligence-informatics/overview) of Mayo Clinic, working with [Dr. Hongfang Liu](https://www.mayo.edu/research/faculty/liu-hongfang-ph-d/bio-00055092). I received my Ph.D at the [School of Electronic and Information Engineering](http://eie.xjtu.edu.cn/), [Xi'an Jiaotong University](http://www.xjtu.edu.cn/) supervised by [Dr. Qinghua Zheng](http://qhzheng.gr.xjtu.edu.cn/). I obtained my master degree and bachelor degreen in software engineering from Xi'an Jiaotong University. My research interest mainly focuses on applying data visualization, visual analytics, and machine learning techniques in addressing real-world clinical challenges.
me.institution: Division of Hematology and Oncology, Department of Medicine, Mayo Clinic
